_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: GFAP expression was significantly downregulated in both the LV-NF-1-treated NSCs and the LV-NF-1+Rictor-treated NSCs... while the count of GFAP-positive cells was reduced to 28.3%
details: Successfully detected GFAP expression, showing significant downregulation in LV-NF-1-treated NSCs and reduction to 28.3% in SCI+LV-NF-1 NSC group compared to controls
